liveStatsHelp: Pulls season stats from balldontlie (NBA) or API-Football (soccer). Cached for an hour between refreshes since the free API tiers have tight daily limits.
compsHelp: Manually logged comparable sale prices from eBay, 130point, PWCC, or wherever you found them — there's no live pricing API wired up, so add these yourself.
negotiationFloorHelp: Cost basis plus your minimum margin % (set in Settings) — a haggling floor so you don't accidentally sell under cost.
hotNotePlaceholder: Why is it hot? (e.g. recent big game, news)
setBackgroundPlaceholder: What makes this set/insert/expansion notable, reprints, errors, tournament relevance…
needMoreComps: Log at least two comps to see a price trend.
reasonRookie: Rookie cards carry a premium — they're the first licensed card of a player's career and demand tends to track early performance/hype.
reasonBaseVeteran: Base and veteran cards are priced more on team/player popularity than scarcity alone.
reasonTcgGeneral: Pricing for TCG cards tracks tournament relevance and nostalgia demand more than raw print numbers.
reasonLimitedPrintRun: An extremely limited print run ({rarity}) is the single biggest driver of this price.
reasonPrintRun: Print run of {rarity} adds scarcity value, though it's not ultra-limited.
reasonRarityTier: Rarity tier "{rarity}" affects how many copies are realistically available to buyers.
reasonGrading: Professional grading ({grade}) removes condition risk for the buyer, which commands a premium over raw copies.
reasonHotNoNote: Currently flagged as a hot card — reprice before quoting.
reasonCompsRange: Comps range from ฿{min} to ฿{max}, suggesting some room to negotiate within that band.
reasonNoComps: No comps logged yet — add some from eBay/130point/PWCC (sports) or TCGplayer/PriceCharting (TCG) to back up this price.
